svg.title: Phase 1 Problem Framing — 4 layers from business context to success metrics
svg.desc: A top-down flowchart showing four layers: business context, core questions, KPI selection, and success criteria

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I write a strong business context statement for marketing campaign analysis?')
g.text: Who ran this campaign? What was the goal? What decisions will this analysis inform?

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I frame performance questions for a marketing campaign analysis project?')
sendPrompt('How do I frame ROI questions for a marketing campaign project?')
sendPrompt('How do I frame audience segmentation questions for marketing analysis?')
sendPrompt('How do I write success criteria for a marketing campaign effectiveness analysis?')
g.text: "A campaign is effective if ROAS > 2.0 and conversion rate > 3%"

svg.text: Recruiter signal: document this in your README before any code
It proves you think like an analyst, not just a coder
